processes.title: Vendor Payment Approval
processes.purpose: Approve valid vendor payments while preventing duplicate, unauthorized, or self-approved disbursements.

roles.label: Accounts Payable Specialist
roles.responsibility: Validate invoice identity, purchase order, receipt, and payment details.

roles.label: Payment Approver
roles.responsibility: Independently approve or reject the payment batch.

steps.title: Capture invoice
steps.instruction: Capture the vendor invoice and link it to the vendor master record.

requirements.label: Unique invoice identifier
requirements.statement: The vendor invoice number must be present and unique for the vendor.

steps.title: Perform three-way match
steps.instruction: Match invoice, purchase order, and receipt; document any exception.

requirements.label: Three-way match
requirements.statement: Invoice, purchase order, and receipt must agree within the approved tolerance.

steps.title: Approve payment
steps.instruction: Independently approve the payment batch after reviewing evidence and exceptions.

requirements.label: Independent approval
requirements.statement: The payment approver must not be the preparer.

transitions.condition: Approver rejects evidence or exception handling

rationales.title: Why approval is independent
rationales.statement: Payment preparation and approval are separated so no person can create and authorize the same disbursement.

exceptions.condition: Receipt is unavailable for an approved service invoice
exceptions.handling: Require a documented service-owner confirmation before approval.
